title: Great Hall (disambiguation)
content:
'''Great Hall''' may refer to:

==[[Canon]]==
*The '''[[Great Hall (Jedi Temple)|Great Hall]]''' of the [[Imperial Palace|Jedi Temple]]
*The '''[[Great Hall (Naboo)|Great Hall]]''' in the [[Theed Hangar]]
*The '''[[Great Hall of the Nihil]]'''

==[[Star Wars Legends|Legends]]==
*The '''[[Great Hall (Arbra)|Great Hall]]''' on [[Arbra/Legends|Arbra]]
*The '''[[Great Hall (Byss)|Great Hall]]''' of the [[Emperor's Citadel]]
*The '''[[Great Hall (Naboo)/Legends|Great Hall]]''' in the [[Theed Hangar/Legends|Theed Hangar]]
*The '''[[Great Hall (Shiva IV)|Great Hall]]''' on [[Shiva IV]]
*The '''[[Great Hall (Testa)|Great Hall]]''' on [[Testa]]
*The '''[[Great Hall of the Jedi Temple]]'''

{{Disambig}}
